entities.name: Day 2: Lower Body Focus
entities.context: Scheduled workout session focused on lower body strength and coordination

entities.name: Goblet Squats
entities.context: Lower body compound exercise using dumbbell or kettlebell, programmed at 3x12

entities.name: Front Squat
entities.context: Alternative to goblet squat for lower body compound movement

entities.name: Romanian Deadlifts (RDLs)
entities.context: Posterior chain exercise at 3x8 with 2-3 tempo using dumbbells

entities.name: Walking Lunges
entities.context: Unilateral lower body exercise, 2 sets x 20 steps

entities.name: Reverse Lunges
entities.context: Alternative to walking lunges for unilateral leg work

entities.name: Box Step Ups
entities.context: Single-leg strength exercise, 3x10 each leg

entities.name: Modified Pistol Squats
entities.context: Alternative to box step ups for single-leg strength

entities.name: Glute Bridges
entities.context: Glute activation and strength exercise, used in warm-up (1x10) and main circuit (3x12)

entities.name: Hip Thrust
entities.context: Alternative to glute bridges, 3x12

entities.name: Calf Raises
entities.context: Standing calf exercise at 3x15 with 2-0-2-0 tempo

entities.name: Pallof Press
entities.context: Anti-rotation core exercise using resistance machine or cable, 3x12 or 3x8 per side

entities.name: Reduced Range of Motion Split Squats
entities.context: Modified split squat variation at 3x8, performed as needed

entities.name: Bear Crawl
entities.context: Coordinative movement exercise, 20 yards forward and back

entities.name: Leg Swings
entities.context: Dynamic warm-up mobility drill, front-to-back and side-to-side, 10 each leg

entities.name: Fire Hydrants
entities.context: Side lying leg raises for glute activation, 1x10 per side in warm-up

entities.name: Strength Circuit
entities.context: Training methodology — exercises performed as a circuit for 1-3 rounds

entities.name: Tempo Training
entities.context: Controlled rep speed (e.g. 2-3 tempo on RDLs, 2-0-2-0 on calf raises) for time under tension

entities.name: Warm-up + Activation
entities.context: 10-15 minute preparatory phase before main strength work

entities.name: Accessory/Coordinative Work
entities.context: Optional supplemental exercises done for fun and movement quality

relationships.context: Listed as interchangeable alternatives for the same programming slot
Reverse lunges offered as alternative to walking lunges
Modified pistol squats listed as alternative to box step ups
Hip thrust offered as alternative to glute bridges in main circuit
Glute bridges appear in both warm-up activation and main strength circuit
RDLs programmed with a 2-3 controlled eccentric tempo
Core anti-rotation exercise included within the lower body strength circuit
Locomotion drill bridging strength circuit and optional accessory work
Both serve as warm-up activation drills preceding the main circuit
The session's main block is structured as a 1-3 round strength circuit
Session begins with a 10-15 minute warm-up and activation phase
